summary: Verified AutoCarousel rewrite: pure CSS marquee, no arrow buttons, smooth continuous auto-scroll, hover pause works. Two carousels render on home with correct inline animation-duration (35s collections, 50s products).
passed: Home renders 2 [data-testid=auto-carousel] elements (Featured Collections + Featured Rudraksha)
Zero [data-testid=carousel-prev] and zero [data-testid=carousel-next] elements on page
Both tracks have class .mv-marquee-track with inline animationDuration set (35s and 50s) matching Home.jsx speed props
Continuous auto-scroll: computed transform translateX decreased from -111.05px to -208.42px over 2s (moved ~48px/s at 35s duration — consistent with linear marquee)
Hover pause: getAnimations()[0].playState === 'paused' and computed animationPlayState === 'paused' when hovering the carousel; transform stays frozen while hovered (verified identical over 1.5s)
10 category tiles [data-testid^=cat-] present and remain clickable
No JS console errors (only two React 'empty src attribute' warnings — pre-existing, unrelated to carousel)
notes: Pre-existing warnings about empty src attributes on elements observed — not related to this change; flagging for future cleanup.
